examples: According to the conventional view, serfdom in nineteenth-century Russia inhibited economic growth.
Moreover, when the antibody was given to chimpanzees, it inhibited rhinoviral growth, and in humans it lessened both the severity and duration of cold symptoms.
Men are more inhibited about touching each other than women are.
Mr Persson shows little sign of being inhibited by the trickiness of politics at home.
The town, once inhibited by about 15, 000 people, is now a very sad scene.
